basic_details.post_name: SBI Clerk (Junior Associate - Customer Support & Sales)
basic_details.short_information: Direct Link: Access SBI Clerk Mains Answer Key 2026, Response Sheet & Scorecard (Login required)

faq.question: Q1. When was SBI Clerk Mains Answer Key 2026 released?
faq.answer: The provisional answer key, response sheet, and scorecard were released on 10th March 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How can I download SBI Clerk Mains Answer Key 2026 ?
faq.answer: Visit www.sbi.co.in, go to Careers > Current Openings, find the relevant link, log in with your credentials, and download from the candidate portal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to raise objections against SBI Clerk Answer Key?
faq.answer: Objections can be raised for a limited period after login; check the official portal for the exact deadline.

faq.question: Q4. When will SBI Clerk Mains Final Answer Key be released?
faq.answer: The final answer key is expected after reviewing all objections (timeline not specified yet).

faq.question: Q5. When will further updates on SBI Clerk 2026 be available?
faq.answer: Check official site for post-objection updates, final selection, and Language Proficiency Test details.
